title: Automation of Ball Tracking in Cricket Using GenAI
description: Develop an automated system for tracking the ball in cricket matches using Generative AI technologies to enhance accuracy and efficiency.
business_case_summary:
Business Case Summary: Automation of Ball Tracking in Cricket Using GenAI (DEM-2026-0104)

Executive Summary
This project aims to develop an automated ball tracking system for cricket using Generative AI to improve match analysis accuracy and operational efficiency.

Business Value/Impact
The solution will enhance real-time decision-making, reduce human error, and provide valuable insights for broadcasters and teams, driving engagement and performance. Automation will also lower monitoring costs during matches.

Risk Mitigation
Medium risks associated with AI accuracy and system integration will be managed through rigorous testing, phased deployment, and continuous model training with real match data to ensure reliability and robustness.
